name: on value_update
title: on value_update
description: The event procedure is called whenever the specified value is updated, regardless of whether the value has changed. You can use the event procedure for all values of communication objects, including e.g. signal and event values, LatestCall or LatestReturn of methods, service states, etc.

parameters.name: <value>
parameters.description: Designates the value on which the procedure shall be called.

row: ChangeTimeNS Last time the value was changed, in nanoseconds since measurement start.
UpdateTimeNS Last time the value was updated, in nanoseconds since measurement start.
